project.name: ФОРМАТ
project.description: Premium turnkey apartment renovation company in Irkutsk.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

spacing_and_layout.rationale: Using completely sharp edges (rounded-none) and geometric alignment to evoke architectural precision and brutalist luxury. Everything must align perfectly on a grid.

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

cards.classes: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

interactive.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-amber-500 hover:text-amber-500 transition-colors

hero_bg.description: Sleek modern dark living room. Apply bg-black/50 overlay.

about_section.description: Architectural blueprints. Used for 'Approach' or 'Calculator' section.

services_bg.description: Renovation tools for the services/pricing section context.

portfolio.description: Portfolio item 2 - TV wall modern setup

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sharp, architectural feel.

components.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large H1 on the left, geometric stats on the right. Heavy dark overlay over the hero image (bg-black/60) to ensure white and amber text pops perfectly.
components.calculator: Use Shadcn Slider for square meters. Shadcn RadioGroup for repair type (Cosmetic, Overhaul, Premium). Dark inputs. Output estimated price instantly. Add a 'Request Measurement' CTA button.
components.pricing_cards: Three distinct columns. Border-collapse style grid or separate cards with sharp edges. High contrast for the 'Premium' tier using a subtle amber inner border.
components.portfolio_gallery: Bento grid (TETRIS MODE). Images must be object-cover, grayscale filter on hover, or zoom-in effect. Implement a Modal/Dialog on click to view full resolution (Zoom functionality).
components.order_form: Shadcn Form. Input fields for Name, Phone. Submit button triggers async SMTP and MongoDB fallback. Add data-testid to all inputs.
components.testimonials: Simple, typography-driven quotes. Large quote marks (text-8xl text-white/5 absolute).
components.faq: Shadcn Accordion. Minimalist styling, border-b border-white/10 only. Amber icons on open.

technical_instructions_for_main_agent: Install 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Manrope' fonts (via Google Fonts or local font face).
Configure Tailwind with the exact colors from this JSON.
All cards and buttons must use rounded-none for the architectural aesthetic.
For the interactive calculator, use React state to instantly calculate the price based on Area * PricePerSqm + TypeMultiplier.
For the Order Form, wire it up to a backend route that handles SMTP sending to lax-jakal@yandex.ru and a MongoDB insert as a fallback.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all buttons, form inputs, and accordion triggers.
Never use generic placeholder images, use only the URLs provided in the media section.
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations (staggered fade-up for portfolio items).
